title: What Is CoQ10 and Why Do Women Over 40 Need It?
seo_title: What Is CoQ10 and Why Women Over 40 Need It
meta_description: CoQ10 declines sharply after 40. Learn what coenzyme Q10 is, why your levels drop, and how it affects energy, heart health, and brain function.
tags: Energy, CoQ10, Brain Health, Anti-Aging, Supplements, Mitochondria
